subject: Multiple Deadlines Overwhelm
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

I currently have four assignments due within the same week across different modules, including KV5002 and KV4006. I've been trying to manage my time but the workload has become unmanageable and I'm seriously struggling.

I understand this isn't a traditional extenuating circumstance but I wanted to ask whether there's any process for requesting deadline adjustments when multiple modules clash like this. Several other students in my cohort are in the same position.

Thank you,
Emily Chen

subject: Group Project Mess
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

Our KV5002 group project has several issues I need your help with:

1. One member has dropped out of the module entirely and we don't know if we should redistribute their section or wait for confirmation from admin.
2. The datasets we need are on a shared Google Drive that the dropped member owned and we've lost access.
3. Our presentation is in Week 11 but we're now a team of 3 instead of 4. Do we get less time or the same?

Sorry for the complex email.

Regards,
Ellie Saunders

subject: Victim of Crime
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

I was the victim of a mugging last Thursday evening near campus. I was physically assaulted and had my laptop and phone stolen. I've reported it to the police and have a crime reference number.

Beyond the practical issue of losing my devices (which contained my KV6003 project work), the experience has left me quite shaken and I'm finding it hard to concentrate. I would like to request an extension while I recover and replace my equipment.

Kind regards,
Marcus Johnson
